model.name: toD
model.title: To D
model.description: Sends the message to a dynamic endpoint
model.label: eip,routing

disabled.label: advanced
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

uri.description: The uri of the endpoint to send to. The uri can be dynamic computed using the simple language.

variableSend.description: To use a variable as the source for the message body to send. This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

variableReceive.description: To use a variable to store the received message body (only body, not headers). This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

pattern.label: advanced
pattern.description: Sets the optional ExchangePattern used to invoke this endpoint.

cacheSize.label: advanced
cacheSize.description: Sets the maximum size used by the ProducerCache which is used to cache and reuse producers when uris are reused. Use 0 for default cache size, or -1 to turn cache off.

ignoreInvalidEndpoint.label: advanced
ignoreInvalidEndpoint.description: Whether to ignore invalid endpoint URIs and skip sending the message.

allowOptimisedComponents.label: advanced
allowOptimisedComponents.description: Whether to allow components to optimise toD if they are SendDynamicAware.

autoStartComponents.label: advanced
autoStartComponents.description: Whether to auto startup components when toD is starting up.

CamelToEndpoint.label: producer
CamelToEndpoint.description: Endpoint URI where this Exchange is being sent to
